examples: In recent years the Austrian economy has outperformed most other industrial economies.

That tradition is said to have started when an Austrian man gave a diamond ring to the woman he wanted to marry.
Austrian president Thomas Klestil insists common European values of democracy and pluralism will continue to apply.
Hutterites are an Anabaptist sect, founded by Austrian preacher Jakob Hutter, in the 16th Century.
